text.message: How is it me there red?

OJ, I didn't cut you off man
Sorry, gonna reneg...payback for the plow
Ok, sorry you feel that way
I did get plowed by you
Its sad but if he wants to win that way by cheating it is what it is
It is cheating to make a deal and not honor it
It is ok to reneg on a deal like that.  Deals are non-binding
Especially if its an instant deal
Ill just report you for griefing
Sounds like you're the one griefing
red ive reported you to the support team for being gay
Also orange how is it me
It will clearly fall on deaf ears
I just feel like this situation should get looked at
Orange i am not going for army
Black is not going to win
So you have no win condition
Blue will connect and end up winning this I feel
The help blue to get the road
This game is honestly just sad
Is all i am going to say
And i am not a liar like black
I have been non-binded before as well.
It sucks for a bit...I agree
I never non bind a deal
But an adult should get over it and play the game
You are doing great keep doing what you doing if that feels good for you
If it makes you even more proud
It doesn't 'feel great' but in that instance, it was a good place to non-bind.
